ASOScan
ASO SKILLS

Expert ASO,
in your AI workflow.

Real keyword volume & difficulty, your app rank, keyword opportunities, competitor & review analysis, and a metadata / ASO-score audit — for Claude, Cursor & any Agent-Skills assistant.
$ npx skills add ASOScan/aso-skills
9 SKILLS 2 work with no API key · powered by the ASOScan API · MIT · github.com/ASOScan/aso-skills
